creator: wxs@FreeBSD.org
text:
I'm able to reproduce this bug and have spent some time trying to track
down the exact cause. The symptom appears to be identical to a bug that
was fixed in c-ares 1.8.0 (switching port numbers to network order), but
I can still trigger it. I'm not sure where the bug lives (curl, c-ares
or git) but I will continue to look into it.

I'm going on vacation this week so please be patient. If you wish to
bring this up on any of the upstream mailing lists to see if they can
reproduce and diagnose it please feel free, but keep me on the CC line.

Thanks for the report and your patience while I am away.

-- WXS
